positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial forest meeting a geometric mountain range. The scene features glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna interwoven with clean, abstractly shaped crystalline structures. A large, crescent moon hangs in the deep indigo sky, illuminating the subjects with soft, ethereal backlight. The color palette is dominated by deep sapphire blue, cyan, vibrant magenta, and touches of metallic gold. Composition must be central, symmetrical, and highly contrasting, suitable for a high-contrast t-shirt graphic print. Linework should be crisp, solid, and bold, in a graphic novel style. Vector illustration quality, highly detailed, clean silhouette, flat color fills with gradient depth, concept art style.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, abstract, realistic, photo, sketch, messy
